---
title: "test_universal_gungnir.py"
path: "C:/Users/Craig/Corvus/CorvusStar/tests/empire_tests/test_universal_gungnir.py"
loc: 31
complexity: 1
logic_score: 7.08
style_score: 1.00
intel_score: 6.56
overall_score: 4.94
---

## Intent
Python module facilitating TestUniversalGungnir, setup_method. It exists to support broader Python integration routines. Its role in the system is to provide foundational utilities for script execution.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 7.1/10
- **Style [S]**: 1.0/10
- **Intel [I]**: 6.6/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 16 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [src.core.engine.gungnir.universal](file://src.core.engine.gungnir.universal)

### Exports
- `TestUniversalGungnir`
- `setup_method`
- `test_logic_python_claustrophobia`
- `test_logic_typescript_birkhoff`
- `test_style_css_dissonance`
- `test_data_json_nesting`
- `test_structure_markdown_density`
- `test_harmony_pass`
